name: Veal Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice as large pieces as possible from a leg of veal.
2. Prepare stuffing by grating bread crumbs, adding softened butter, minced onion, salt, and pepper.
3. Spread the stuffing evenly over each slice of veal.
4. Beat an egg and place it on top of the stuffing.
5. Roll up each slice tightly and secure with a thread.
6. Place a few cloves in each roll.
7. In a skillet, coat the rolls lightly with grated bread crumbs and melted butter.
8. Cook the rolls until browned, then transfer to a serving dish.
9. Make gravy from the pan juices and pour it over the veal olives.
10. Remove the threads and garnish with sliced hard-boiled eggs before serving.
